issue_summary: more extensions to accommodating different Random's
javadoc_before:
/** * Generates a string of random chars from the B64T set. *

* The salt is generated with {@link ThreadLocalRandom}. *

* * @param num * Number of chars to generate. */
javadoc_after:
/** * Generates a string of random chars from the B64T set. *

* The salt is generated with {@link SecureRandom}. *

* * @param num Number of chars to generate. * @return a random salt {@link String}. */
